animations.description: Custom FadeIn component used throughout the page for scroll-reveal. Elements start invisible (opacity: 0, translateY offset) and transition to visible when they enter the viewport. The .visible class is toggled by an IntersectionObserver. 16 total instances with various staggered delays (0s, 0.15s, 0.2s, 0.3s, 0.45s, 0.6s, 0.75s, 0.9s).
animations.motionEquivalent: inView('.FadeIn-module-scss-module__C4C9Kq__fadeIn', ({ target }) => animate(target, { opacity: [0, 1], y: [20, 0] }, { duration: 0.6, easing: 'cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1)' }))

notes.fadeInComponent: The page uses a custom React FadeIn component (FadeIn-module-scss-module__C4C9Kq__fadeIn) that applies CSS transitions (opacity + transform) controlled by an IntersectionObserver. When elements enter the viewport, a .visible class is added which triggers the transition. This is a scroll-reveal pattern implemented via CSS transitions rather than CSS animations. 16 total FadeIn elements exist on the page; 2 are immediately visible (hero section), 14 are pending viewport entry.
notes.noLibraries: No third-party animation libraries (GSAP, Framer Motion, AOS, Lottie, etc.) were detected on this page. All animations are implemented using native CSS animations, CSS transitions, and the Web Animations API.
notes.webAnimationsApi: 6 Web Animations API animations are running, all corresponding to the same CSS animations (pulsate-signal x2, pulsate x2, blink x1, marquee x1). This duplication is likely due to how the browser reports CSS animations via document.getAnimations().
notes.transitionNotes: 741 CSS transitions were detected in total, but 627 of them are the default 'all 0s ease' universal reset which has no practical visual effect. The 26 unique meaningful transition patterns are fully represented in this catalog.

highlights: Mars signal pulsating SVG circles with staggered delays create a radar-like ripple effect
Custom FadeIn scroll-reveal component with 16 instances and various stagger delays
Camera interface with blink indicator, pan container, crosshair opacity reveals and carousel buttons
Audio bar marquee ticker animation at 12s linear loop
Photo collage staggered entrance with 150ms delay increments (up to 0.9s total)
Draggable windows section with scroll-triggered reveal
No animation libraries - all native CSS and WAAPI
